description: Log in to Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!). A user account 'dev.lead' has been compromised and has Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) enabled. Secure the account by resetting the password for 'dev.lead' to 'Recovery#2026!' and disabling their 2FA. Ensure that the 'Require password change' option is unchecked for this user.
